The following events took place in approximately '''7328 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Shey Tapani]] of [[House Melantha]] unites the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] in a series of bloody civil wars.
*The Tapani sector enters what will be later referred to as the [[Dynastic Era]].<ref name="Player's Guide to Tapani">''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''</ref>
*The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] is declared capital of the Tapani Sector, and the twelve ruling kingdoms are reorganized as [[Tapani Noble Houses|nine noble houses]] subordinate to the [[Tapani Empire]].

==Battles==
*[[Battle of Shindra's Veil]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
